item.title: The Truth About This Stepfather Was Worse Than Anyone Expected
item.description:
Ten-month-old Jacob Crouch should have been surrounded by love and safety. Instead, prosecutors told the court he endured months of repeated abuse before suffering a fatal assault that claimed his life in December 2020. His stepfather, Craig Crouch, was found guilty of his murder, while Jacob's mother, Gemma Barton, was cleared of murder. The heartbreaking case raised difficult questions about child protection, missed warning signs, and how prolonged abuse can remain hidden behind closed doors.
Do you think more could have been done to recognize the warning signs and protect Jacob before it was too late?

media:content.media:title: The Truth About This Stepfather Was Worse Than Anyone Expected
media:content.media:description:
Ten-month-old Jacob Crouch should have been surrounded by love and safety. Instead, prosecutors told the court he endured months of repeated abuse before suffering a fatal assault that claimed his life in December 2020. His stepfather, Craig Crouch, was found guilty of his murder, while Jacob's mother, Gemma Barton, was cleared of murder. The heartbreaking case raised difficult questions about child protection, missed warning signs, and how prolonged abuse can remain hidden behind closed doors.
Do you think more could have been done to recognize the warning signs and protect Jacob before it was too late?
